query: I need to export the homepage Page Designer page from our shared content library so I can review its component structure.

I want to validate our Page Designer metadefinitions against the actual page JSON to check for missing component types or broken references.
I want to create a new Page Designer component type with custom regions and attribute groups. What should my JSON meta definition look like?

I need to edit content slot configurations in Business Manager for our category landing pages.
